one-month supply of drugs. This estimate should be based on available plan data (such as the most 
current 6 months of PDE data) for retail pharmacies only. Neither retail extended day supply nor mail 
order location data should be included in the estimate. 

Starting in 2016, CMS changed how they describe pharmacy networks. The INP are currently referred 
to as standard retail pharmacies. There is no change in the meaning of the variable, and the
